paper_text: This paper analyzes the impact of Maximal Extractable Value (MEV) attacks on decentralized networks utilizing Proof of Stake. We propose a novel decentralized sequencer architecture combined with encrypted mempools to mitigate transaction reordering and front-running.
proposed_countermeasure: Decentralized sequencer architecture with encrypted mempools.

paper_text: We present a comprehensive review of Eclipse attacks targeting peer-to-peer gossip networks within Proof of Work blockchains. Our findings suggest that increasing the outbound connection limit and implementing strict IP-binding rules severely degrades the attacker's success rate.
proposed_countermeasure: Increasing outbound connection limits and strict IP-binding rules.
